allow: PowerShell($old = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\projects\\-Users-thegabrielr10-Documents-10-Curso-de-IA--Claude--00-ProyectoDEMO"; $new = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-Maxserin-Documents-10-Curso-de-IA--Claude--00-ProyectoDEMO"; "===== ANTIGUO ====="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $old -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LastWriteTime, Length, Name | Sort-Object LastWriteTime; "===== ACTUAL ====="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $new -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LastWriteTime, Length, Name | Sort-Object LastWriteTime)

PowerShell($old = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\projects\\-Users-thegabrielr10-Documents-10-Curso-de-IA--Claude--00-ProyectoDEMO"; $new = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-Maxserin-Documents-10-Curso-de-IA--Claude--00-ProyectoDEMO"; Get-ChildItem $old | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'memory' } | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination $new -Recurse -Force }; "== Resultado en carpeta ACTUAL =="; Get-ChildItem $new | Select-Object LastWriteTime, Length, Name)
